skill.name: app-store-screenshots
skill.description: App Store and Google Play screenshot creation with exact platform specs. Covers iOS/Android dimensions, gallery ordering, device mockups, and preview videos. Use for: app store optimization, ASO, app screenshots, app preview, play store listing. Triggers: app store screenshots, aso, app store optimization, play store screenshots, app preview, app listing, ios screenshots, android screenshots, app store images, app mockup, device mockup, app gallery, store listing
skill.summary: Create professional App Store and Google Play screenshots with exact platform specifications using AI image generation
skill.author: inference-sh-9

security_audit.summary: This skill is documentation-only with no executable code. Static findings flagged example bash commands in markdown code blocks and hardcoded service URLs, but these are legitimate documentation patterns - the skill calls an external AI image generation API (inference.sh) for screenshot creation. No malicious patterns confirmed.

medium_findings.title: Example Commands in Documentation
medium_findings.description: Markdown contains example bash commands (curl install, infsh CLI calls). These are documentation for users to run, not executed by the skill.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: These are example commands in code blocks for documentation purposes. The skill itself is pure markdown documentation, not executable code.

medium_findings.title: Hardcoded Service URLs
medium_findings.description: References to inference.sh service URLs for AI image generation API calls.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Expected API endpoints for the image generation service. Not data exfiltration - these are legitimate service URLs.

content.user_title: Create App Store Screenshots with AI
content.value_statement: Generate professional App Store and Google Play screenshots with exact iOS/Android dimensions, device mockups, and preview videos using AI image generation.
actual_capabilities: Generate iOS App Store screenshots with exact dimensions for iPhone and iPad
Create Google Play Store screenshots with proper aspect ratios and specs
Produce device mockup images with AI-generated app interfaces
Create preview videos for App Store and Google Play listings
Provide screenshot ordering best practices based on the First 3 Rule
Generate localized screenshots for international app markets
limitations: Requires inference.sh CLI and API access for image generation
Does not capture actual app screens - generates mockups from text prompts
Cannot directly upload to App Store - generates assets only
Preview video generation depends on external AI video service

use_cases.title: Mobile App Developer
use_cases.description: Quickly create professional store listings without hiring a designer. Generate on-brand screenshots that match exact platform requirements.
use_cases.target_user: Mobile app developers launching new apps or updating listings

use_cases.title: ASO Specialist
use_cases.description: Generate multiple screenshot variations for A/B testing. Optimize the first 3 screenshots for maximum conversion with different captions and styles.
use_cases.target_user: App store optimization specialists and growth marketers

use_cases.title: Startup Founder
use_cases.description: Create store-ready assets without design skills. Get professional screenshots that follow best practices for launch day.
use_cases.target_user: Solo founders and small teams with limited design resources

prompt_templates.title: Generate Hero Screenshot
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a hero App Store screenshot for a [APP TYPE] app. Show an iPhone 15 Pro displaying the main feature: [FEATURE DESCRIPTION]. Use a clean device mockup with soft gradient background, professional product photography style. Dimensions: 1290 x 2796 pixels.
prompt_templates.scenario: Creating the first and most important screenshot that stops the scroll

prompt_templates.title: Feature Highlight with Callouts
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate an app store screenshot showing [APP NAME] on iPhone with [SPECIFIC FEATURE] highlighted. Include subtle callout arrows pointing to the feature. Clean white background, professional marketing asset style, modern UI design. Size: 2K resolution.

prompt_templates.title: Lifestyle Context Screenshot
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a lifestyle App Store screenshot showing a person using [APP NAME] on an iPhone in [SETTING]. Show the app interface with [FEATURE]. Kitchen background with warm natural lighting, over-the-shoulder perspective, authentic lifestyle photography feel.
prompt_templates.scenario: Creating relatable screenshots that show the app in real use

prompt_templates.title: Before/After Comparison
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate a split-screen comparison app store screenshot. Left side: [BEFORE STATE]. Right side: [AFTER STATE with app]. Clean, professional marketing asset, horizontal layout, modern design.
prompt_templates.scenario: Demonstrating transformation or value proposition visually

output_examples.input: Generate hero screenshot for a fitness tracking app showing activity rings
output_examples.output: A 1290x2796 iPhone 15 Pro mockup displaying a beautiful fitness app with colorful activity rings (red, green, blue), workout summary cards, floating at a slight angle against a soft purple gradient background, professional product shot with subtle reflection and shadow

output_examples.input: Create feature highlight for AI writing assistant
output_examples.output: Clean iPhone screenshot showing a messaging app with AI writing suggestions highlighted in a subtle glow, white background, professional marketing style with 2-3 small UI callout arrows pointing to the suggestion feature

best_practices: Follow the First 3 Rule - these screenshots get 80% of visibility, so communicate your core value proposition first
Write benefit-focused captions (what the user gets) rather than feature-focused text (what the app does)
Use exact platform dimensions - iPhone 6.7 inch requires 1290x2796, iPhone 6.5 inch requires 1284x2778
anti_patterns: Using settings or onboarding screens as screenshots - these show friction, not value
Writing feature-focused captions like 'Push Notification System' instead of benefits like 'Never Miss a Deadline'
Using screenshots from different app versions - outdated UI makes your app look abandoned

faq.question: What dimensions do iPhone App Store screenshots need?
faq.answer: iPhone 6.7 inch (15 Pro Max) requires 1290x2796 pixels. iPhone 6.5 inch (11 Pro Max) requires 1284x2778 pixels. iPad Pro 12.9 inch requires 2048x2732 pixels.

faq.question: How many screenshots can I upload to the App Store?
faq.answer: Apple allows up to 10 screenshots per localization. Google Play allows up to 8 screenshots per device type.

faq.question: Do I need a device frame for App Store screenshots?
faq.answer: No, device frames are optional. You can use device frames, full-bleed UI (no frame), or lifestyle context shots. Test different styles with A/B testing on Google Play.

faq.question: What makes a good App Store screenshot?
faq.answer: Focus on the first 3 screenshots - they get 80% of impressions. Use benefit-focused captions (max 2 lines), show the core value proposition, and make the first screenshot your hero shot.

faq.question: Can I use the same screenshots for iOS and Android?
faq.answer: Not recommended. iOS and Android have different aspect ratios and guidelines. iOS uses portrait-oriented screenshots while Android supports both 16:9 and 9:16 orientations.

faq.question: How do I localize App Store screenshots?
faq.answer: For primary markets (English, Japanese, Korean, German, French), create new screenshots with translated captions. For secondary markets, translate captions only. Other markets can use English defaults.
